film..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('size').isNumber() && newData.child('duration').isNumber() && (!newData.hasChild('source') || newData.child('source').val() === 'file' || (newData.child('source').val() === 'youtube' && newData.child('youtubeId').isString() && newData.child('youtubeId').val().matches(/^[A-Za-z0-9_-]{11}$/)) || (newData.child('source').val() === 'storage' && newData.child('storagePath').isString() && newData.child('storagePath').val().matches(/^rooms\/[0-9]{4}\//))))

nextFilm..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('size').isNumber() && newData.child('duration').isNumber() && newData.child('source').val() === 'storage' && newData.child('storagePath').isString() && newData.child('storagePath').val().matches(/^rooms\/[0-9]{4}\//))

$memberId..validate: newData.val() === null || (newData.child('name').isString() && newData.child('name').val().length <= 28 && newData.child('avatar').isString() && newData.child('isHost').isBoolean() && newData.child('micEnabled').isBoolean() && newData.child('joinedAt').isNumber() && newData.child('updatedAt').isNumber())

$messageId..validate: newData.hasChildren(['senderId','senderName','senderAvatar','text','createdAt']) && newData.child('senderId').isString() && newData.child('senderName').isString() && newData.child('senderAvatar').isString() && newData.child('text').isString() && newData.child('text').val().length <= 320 && newData.child('createdAt').isNumber() && (!newData.hasChild('replyTo') || (newData.child('replyTo').child('messageId').isString() && newData.child('replyTo').child('senderName').isString() && newData.child('replyTo').child('text').isString() && newData.child('replyTo').child('text').val().length <= 140))
